projects.subtitle: Discover the services we've built
projects.showcase_subtitle: The most actively growing projects at SidequestLab

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.quote: A lab that gathers people with compelling ideas and creates sustainable value within communities
vision.vision_desc: We become a lab that simultaneously creates technical and business value through diverse side projects.
vision.mission_desc: We rapidly bring ideas to life with our AI agent team, operating safely with our Harness quality assurance system.

values.title: Core Values
values.items_1_desc: We prioritize execution over perfection. Build MVPs fast and validate in the market.
values.items_2_desc: We extract lessons from every project and apply them to the next.
values.items_3_desc: We document all decisions and progress so anyone can track them.
values.items_4_desc: We improve decision quality through multi-faceted reviews by our Board Advisor.
values.items_5_desc: We continuously improve through data and retrospectives, not gut feelings.

cta.title: All these processes are operated by AI agents
cta.subtitle: Only one human — the Chairman. Everyone else is an AI agent.

harness_teaser.title: How Do We Ensure AI Agent Quality?
harness_teaser.desc: L0 Safety Net, L1 Enablement, L2 Traceable Ops — Harness Engineering System perfected over 6 versions

project_lifecycle.title: Project Lifecycle
project_lifecycle.description: From PRD creation to post-deploy verification, with S/A/B/L grade classification and 3-tier QA verification
constraints: No production deployment without QA verification
All projects start after PRD approval

decision_process.title: Decision-Making Process
decision_process.description: From issue occurrence to rule enforcement, with CEO-Advisor check system and incident-to-rule closure loop
constraints: All decisions recorded with DEC number

quality_gate.title: 8-Step Quality Gate
quality_gate.description: Automated 8-step verification pipeline from Syntax to Integration. Dev-QA-DevOps 3-tier role separation
constraints: Rollback to failed step on failure

tech_review.title: Tech Review Protocol
tech_review.description: Company fit pre-check comes first, objectivity ensured through Board Advisor cross-check

footer.description: A laboratory that creates value through various side projects

metadata.description: How we ensure quality when 8 AI agents modify code

hero.title:

architecture.title: 3-Layer Quality Assurance Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Each layer operates independently, implementing a Defense in Depth strategy

versions.title: Version History
versions.subtitle: Evolution from v1.0 to v5.1 across 6 versions
versions.v1_desc: Started hooks-based secret protection and dangerous command blocking
versions.v2_desc: SKILL.md introduced to specify per-agent roles and behavior rules
versions.v4_desc: agent.md-based tool permission matrix, 100% role awareness achieved
versions.v5_desc: run_id tracking system, log collection, KPI measurement framework completed
versions.v5_1_desc: Introduced core SKILL.md + references/ separation. 680→134 lines streamlined, all 7 agents completed. Migrated to .claude/skills/ path

kpi.title: KPI — Internal Validation Benchmarks
kpi.subtitle: All figures are based on internal smoke tests and Sprint D benchmarks
